comment.body:
SPX Game Plan for Wednesday, March 12 (CPI Day)
Market Context:
Tuesday (3/11): SPX wide range day (5528–5635); closed volatile session.
Overnight: E-mini trading range (5574–5614), implying SPX opening between 5565–5605.
Catalysts:
Ukraine ceasefire tentative, awaiting Russia’s confirmation.
Government shutdown: House passed bill; Senate faces challenges ahead of 3/14 deadline.
Trump tariff announcements increased volatility.
Key Data & Events:
Wed, 3/12:
08:30 AM – CPI
12:00 PM – 10Y Auction
Thu, 3/13: PPI, Jobless Claims, 30Y Auction
Fri, 3/14: Consumer Sentiment, Debt Ceiling Deadline
Mon, 3/17: VIXperation + FOMC
Options & Gamma Structure:
Put OI Clusters: Heavy at 5560, 5550, significant at 5500; 5590–5610 smaller cluster.
Call OI Clusters: 5600–5620 immediate overhead; significant at 5675, 5700, minor at 5730.
Expected Move: ±84 pts (5528–5675 range)
Volatility Structure:
VIX9D (28.9) > VIX (26.13) > VIX3M (25.25) = Backwardation
IV in 30s; expect ~1.7% swings.
Consolidated SPX 0DTE Road Map:
Chop Zone: 5585–5620
IF within chop zone:
Expect choppy, range-bound trading.
IF near 5585, potential bounce setups.
IF near 5620, potential reversal or breakout setups.
Above Chop Zone (Bullish):
IF SPX > 5620:
Initial stall/reaction at 5630–5635 (Tuesday high).
Break above 5635 targets 5645–5650 (possible stall).
IF sustained > 5650, accelerated move toward 5665, then 5675 (major OI resistance).
IF SPX > 5675, next target 5700–5705 (expect volatile reactions—"popcorn time").
Below Chop Zone (Bearish):
IF SPX < 5585:
Initial magnet to 5575, then key reaction level at 5565 (JPM put spread).
Break below 5565 opens 5550 magnet, with accelerated downside to retest Tuesday low (5530).
IF SPX fails 5530, critical test at 5500 (major OI cluster, expect sharp reversal or continued breakdown).
IF below 5500, next stall at 5475; deeper acceleration opens risk to extreme at 5490.
Extreme Levels:
Upper extreme resistance: 5740
Lower extreme support: 5490
Contrarian & Risk Management:
Key reaction pivots: 5565, 5550, 5570, 5540, 5635, 5665, and identified VIX pivots.
IF volatility contracts within chop zone, anticipate range breakout setups.
IF volatility spikes, extend targets and adjust risk management.
IF extreme levels (5740 or 5490) approached, adjust position size and tighten stops.
Final Notes:
CPI reaction may initially mislead; confirm move via VIX9D.
Negative gamma and elevated IV imply rapid directional shifts possible.
Watch closely for reversals at identified OI cluster zones.
